prompt: Based on the comic cover page, generate a comic page, starting with Spider Man in a dynamic swinging pose high above a cityscape. Use the classic comic book art style and dramatic composition found in the reference image for inspiration.
prompt_refined: Generate a new comic page featuring Spider-Man in a dynamic web-swinging pose, positioned prominently in the foreground and high above a sprawling cityscape. Adopt the classic, vibrant comic book art style and dramatic low-angle composition observed in image 1, looking up at Spider-Man as he swings towards the right. Ensure towering buildings recede into the background, emphasizing his elevated perspective and the vastness of the city below.
objects: Spider-Man (prominently in the foreground, in a dynamic web-swinging pose, swinging towards the right)
Classic, vibrant comic book art style
